name: syscribe-lsp
description: LSP client for the Syscribe model format — diagnostics, navigation, completion, and rename over `syscribe lsp`.

syscribe.serverPath.description: Path to the syscribe binary (must be built with the `lsp` subcommand). Defaults to `syscribe` on PATH.

syscribe.modelRoot.description: Model root passed as `-m <path>` (relative to the workspace folder). Leave empty to let the server auto-discover it (--model flag > SYSCRIBE_MODEL env > walk-up to the nearest .syscribe.toml > "model").
